title: Bound mesh retries with timeouts and a retry budget
description: Set per-try timeouts inside an overall request timeout and limit retry attempts/budget so retries don't amplify load during an outage.
body: Use when configuring resilience for a route. Do not set unlimited retries or a per-try timeout larger than the overall timeout (retries never fire). Actions: set an overall route timeout, a smaller per-try timeout, a bounded number of attempts with retryOn for idempotent failures only, and cap concurrency so a failing dependency can't be hammered by retry storms. Validation signals include an injected 5xx retried up to the limit then failing fast, and total in-flight load staying bounded during a dependency outage. Risk boundary: enabling retries on non-idempotent production routes risks duplicate effects and is human-gated.
